title: Campus Project · Presensi SMPN 2 Paliyan — School Attendance
points: IoT-based school attendance system (campus/community team project) — installed and used for daily attendance at SMPN 2 Paliyan.
My contribution: the ESP32 firmware, the gate-device hardware assembly (RC522 RFID, keypad, LCD, DS3231 RTC, W5500 Ethernet, SD card, UPS backup), and the backend server (Flask + Firebase Firestore).
Fault-tolerant device: SD-card store-and-forward through network drops and a UPS through power outages; watchdog + scheduled reboot for 24/7 operation.

title: Commissioned IoT Builder · VIBRADoor
points: Built VIBRADoor, a wireless vibrating doorbell for deaf students at SLB Damayanti Sleman — a commissioned project; one pair deployed and still in daily use.
Owned the ESP32 firmware and hardware assembly of both the transmitter and the wearable, communicating over a self-hosted MQTT (Mosquitto) broker.
Designed for field maintenance: custom PCB with swappable modules and LiPo + TP4056 power; total BOM Rp 366k per pair.

title: Competition Project · PAYCAY — Smart EV Charging
points: Developed PAYCAY, an end-to-end smart EV charging station (SPKLU) system that won 1st place (Produk IoT) at ARCADIA 2026 — built solo across firmware, backend, web, and mobile.
ESP32 firmware (PZEM-004T metering + RC522 RFID + AC relay), Flask backend with a real-time Socket.IO dashboard, Firebase Realtime DB, and a Flutter companion app.
Deployed live on Microsoft Azure App Service; applied advanced Python (OOP, ABCs, decorators, design patterns).

title: Lab Assistant · Data Acquisition Systems (IoT Concentration)
points: Assist the Data Acquisition practicum (IoT concentration): guiding students through sensor reading, data logging, and telemetry on ESP32.
Prepare weekly practicum materials and help debug student wiring and firmware during lab sessions.

title: Lab Assistant · Hardware Development
points: Assisted the Hardware Development practicum: microcontroller fundamentals and component-level wiring with Arduino and ESP32.
Maintained lab equipment inventory and prepared weekly practicum kits.
